title: Caramelized Chinese Dates Stir-fry
description: This rich and crispy date-night dish features a caramelized sugar sauce that pairs perfectly with tender dates and crunchy almonds for a raw-friendly appetizer.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add ginger and sauté for about 30 seconds, until fragrant but not browned.
Remove from heat, add dates to the pan and stir-fry them with salt until they release their juice.
Pour in sugar and immediately bring to a boil. Stir constantly to prevent burning and let it caramelize slightly.
Once the mixture starts thickening, reduce heat to medium-low and slowly fold in toasted almonds.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the dates are fully coated with the caramelized sauce and lightly crispy on the edges.
